canonical_answer: A woman with dark brown hair wearing a black top stands in a room. She manipulates sections of her hair with both hands near her head. A black-framed mirror leans against the wall in the background. A grey towel hangs on a hook to the left. She holds a black hair styling tool in her hand.

canonical_answer: At 0s, the woman shows the back of her styled hair; at 4s, she holds up a black ring to the camera; at 12s, she raises both hands to adjust her hair; at 16s, she gathers hair at the top of her head; at 18s, she pulls a section upwards with her left hand.
